title: EVENTS – hololive（ホロライブ）公式サイト

items.title: Chronicles of hololive EN: THE NEXUS GATE -ActⅠ: The Portal Awakens-
items.author: narita
items.content:
hololive English’s official pop-up store “Chronicles of hololive EN: THE NEXUS GATE -ActⅠ: The Portal Awakens-” announces additional information!

hololive English official pop up store “Chronicles of hololive EN: THE NEXUS GATE -ActⅠ: The Portal Awakens-”

Monday, October 6th – Sunday, November 2nd, 2025 (EDT) Opening hours: 11:00 AM – 8:00 PM* Open until 7:00 PM on Sundays only. Please note that these opening hours are different from the opening hours of AMERICAN DREAM at the venue. * The exhibition and merchandise areas have the same opening hours.

Exhibition Area: Court C, Level 1 Merchandise Sales Area: Court G, Level1, G170

・ Previously released official hololive English merchandise. ・ hololive OFFICIAL CARD GAME English Edition* We plan to sell additional merchandise at a later date. Details of these items will be announced at a later date. * Please note that certain merchandise items, such as THE NEXUS GATE goods, have purchase limits per transaction. Details will be posted at the on-site merchandise area.

All bonuses will be distributed until stocks run out.

・ Shopping bag (plastic) / THE NEXUS GATE logo motif design

・ hololive OFFICIAL CARD GAME PR card (Design: hololive STAGE World Tour ’25 -Synchronize!-)

* This is the same card as the one distributed at the hololive production booth at Anime NYC 2025 and the Bushiroad booth at Anime EXPO 2025.

■ Per purchase / more than $70 ・ Greeting Ticket (each 30pcs)* Please refer to the Event section on this page for details regarding the Greeting.

, we will implement a numbered ticket system for merchandise purchases. 1. Starting at 11:00 AM on October 6th, numbered tickets will be distributed on a first-come, first-served basis in the exhibition area.

2. The merchandise area will open at 12:00 PM on October 6th. During the following time slots, only customers holding the above numbered tickets can enter the area.

・ Ticket No.1 – 50 / Queueing in merchandise area: 11:40 AM – 11:59 AM EDT / Entry to merchandise area: 12:00 PM – 12:40 PM EDT ・ Ticket No.51 – 90 / Queueing in merchandise area: 12:40 PM – 12:59 PM EDT / Entry to merchandise area: 1:00 PM – 1:40 PM EDT* Free entry is scheduled to begin after 1:40PM, once ticket-based entry concludes. Please note that entry restrictions may be implemented depending on the situation on the day. * Once you have used your numbered ticket, you cannot re-enter until free entry begins.

Period: October 6th – November 2nd

We’ve prepared a mystery quiz for you in the exhibition area.

Please give it a try!* Those who participate in the mystery solving event on the day will receive a free illustration sticker (one of one type) featuring the exhibit.

Period: October 11th – October 12th

Participating talent: Shiori Novella, Koseki Bijou, Nerissa Ravencroft

Time Slot of Talents Appearance

・ October 11th 5:30 PM – 7:00 PM EDT / Koseki Bijou

・ October 12th 12:00 PM – 1:30 PM EDT / Nerissa Ravencroft

・ October 12th 3:00 PM – 4:30 PM EDT / Shiori Novella

1. Spend $70 or more in a single transaction to receive one Greeting Session Numbered Ticket with one talent.

2. Fill out the details on the ticket and hand the receipt to the Greeting Session staff on the day of purchase.

3. Greeting Session staff will verify that the attendee’s ID is the same as what is written on the receipt, tear off and collect the receipt (stub), and stamp a “Certification Stamp” on the ticket.

4. Come back to the store on the date and time written on the numbered ticket.

5. Greet the talent and receive a gift from her.* Tickets will be distributed on a first-come, first-served basis, and distribution will end as soon as stock runs out. The staff will not be able to provide a different ticket or change the assigned time slot.

・ Each participant will be available to attend a maximum of one Greeting Session per talent.

・ Participants will receive only one Numbered Ticket per purchase.

* Even if your purchase is $140 or more, you will only receive one ticket. * Participants may join multiple Greeting Sessions with different talents, provided they have the appropriate tickets and have not already attended a session with that talent. ・ Participants will have to present an ID to the staff for identification on the day of the Greeting Session..

・ Participants will have to follow staff instructions during the Greeting Session.

・ Participants will have to treat talents and staff with respect.

・ Tickets will be considered invalid if there is no Certification Stamp.

・ The organizers have the right to disqualify the participants at their own discretion if the participants violate any rules or regulations of the Greeting Session, disrupt, or cause inconvenience to the event or staff.

・ The greeting event with the talent will be held only on October 11th and 12th.

Exhibition period: October 18th – November 2nd

Post your hololive English fan art on social media using the hashtag #holoPopNEXUS!

Your work may be featured in an exhibition at THE NEXUS GATE pop-up!

For application details, application period, terms, and details, please see the link below!https://forms.gle/K3zWE9JTv6VLnBJk8* Images submitted before the application period are also accepted. However, please re-post your work on social media using the hashtag #holoPopNEXUS during the application period and submit it via the application URL above.

Exhibition period: October 25th – November 2nd

Post photos of your hololive English “oshi” (favorite talent) from various angles on social media using the hashtag #holoPopNEXUS!

Just like fan art, we may feature your photos in an exhibition at THE NEXUS GATE pop-up!

e.g. ・ Cosplay photos of your oshi (from professional cosplay to simple ones like hair accessories)

・ Photos of your oshi merchandise (photos of you wearing your oshi merchandise)

・ Photos of you performing for your oshi

For application details, application period, terms, and details, please see the link below!https://forms.gle/ugbaMLiJCA9ULK2q6* Photos submitted before the application period are also accepted. However, please re-post your work on social media using the hashtag #holoPopNEXUS during the application period and submit it via the application URL above.

Period: November 1st – November 2nd

Something new might appear……

More details to come!

For any inquiries regarding the Pop-Up Store, please contact the following e-mail address: info@shibuyadreams.com
